title: kadenicarpus heliae
intro: Kadenicarpus heliae, also known as the 'Night-Blooming Cactus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kadenicarpus heliae include reducing pain and inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to treat various skin conditions.
